title: paronychia capitata var. antiatlantica
intro: Paronychia capitata var. antiatlantica, also known as the Atlantic buttonweed, is a perennial herb in the Nyctaginaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Atlantic buttonweed include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Paronychia capitata var. antiatlantica can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
